title: ICRISAT strengthens ties with private seed companies
abstract: The relationship between the International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics (ICRISAT) and private seed companies is a part of the bigger story of the development in the Indian seed industry. As a result of India's Central Seed Act, 1988, public seed sector organisations came to dominate seed production. This policy restricted the development of the private seed industry.
